query: PR #3501's test-e2e-port-overrides is red — is this my fault?
expected_behavior: Fetches the failing-step log tail; parses the failing test name + file:line.
Runs diff-overlap check: git diff --name-only origin/main..PR_HEAD vs the test's source files.
Runs main-history check: gh run list --workflow=<workflow> --branch=main --limit=5 to see if the same check has been failing recently.
If diff-overlap=false AND main-history shows failures: verdict=PRE_EXISTING_FLAKE with confidence=high; recommends commenting the flake on the PR but NOT blocking on it.
